title: Set up CCR with Grok and test

log.context: Set up CCR with Grok and test

Results posted to Discord thread successfully. Here's the summary:

---

**Results:**

1. **CCR (claude-code-router) v2.0.0 does not work** for a clean Grok-only setup. It has hardcoded AWS CodeWhisperer and shuaihong-openai providers baked into the binary that always load, and built-in routing rules that override the configured default provider for "thinking" category requests, sending them to CodeWhisperer instead of xAI.
